title: Flowable API Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Flowable BPMN REST engine pass-through

flowable.description: Identifier for the Flowable API extension

base_url.description: Flowable REST base URL, e.g. http://flowable-rest:8080/flowable-rest

auth_type.description: Authentication scheme used against the Flowable REST API

username.description: Technical user (required when auth_type is basic)

password.description: Technical user password (required when auth_type is basic)

token.description: Bearer token (required when auth_type is bearer)

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify the engine's TLS certificate
